title: Coming to a Theater near You!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home after a day out with Nishino
Flower, we're passing by the train station when...

text_block_list.name: Digital Billboard Audio
text_block_list.text: We decide our own future!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Digital Billboard Audio
text_block_list.text: The epic tale finally hits the big screen! Majestic Girls: The Final Chapter !

text_block_list.name: Digital Billboard Audio
text_block_list.text:
Please, Seiryu, Shishi O! Take to the skies once
more and unleash your thunderous roars!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The Majestic Girls movie! I didn't realize it was almost out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower gleefully watches the trailer for an
animated film being displayed on the large
monitor.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes! Majestic Girls is an animated series. I'd heard a movie was in the works...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But that was the first time I've seen the trailer for
it! I can't wait to see it! I wonder how it'll turn
out?
choice_data_list: So you're a big fan, then?
So you're a big fan, then?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It's about girls my age who pilot robots
and do battle against giant monsters.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Each episode is filled with thrilling twists and
turns! The character designs are adorable, and
the robots are super cool!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The TV series is already over, so I've been really
excited about this upcoming movie!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry. You're probably really bored listening
to me babble on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, it's oddly satisfying to catch a
glimpse of such an unexpected side of Nishino
Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
R-really? You don't think it's a bit childish to
watch a cartoon?
choice_data_list: I think anyone can enjoy them.
I think anyone can enjoy them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for saying so, Trainer. It really makes
me feel like I can enjoy it without feeling
embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod in approval and, seeing a chance to further
put her mind at ease, decide to delve deeper into
the topic.
choice_data_list: We should go see the movie together.
We should go see the movie together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod in approval and, seeing a chance to further
put her mind at ease, decide to delve deeper into
the topic.
choice_data_list: We should go see the movie together.
We should go see the movie together.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: S-sure thing!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, my favorite characters are the two heroines,
Kaede and Mana...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nishino Flower excitedly tells me all about Majestic Girls as we head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promise to watch the original TV series and
movie together with her when it comes out.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-you really mean it?! Yes! By all means!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, but... You haven't seen the Majestic Girls TV series, have you, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'd better watch that first, huh?
I'd better watch that first, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You should definitely watch it before the
movie!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I have all the episodes recorded, so we could
watch them together, if you'd like?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to rewatch it before I see the movie
anyhow, so this would be perfect!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe! Yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nishino Flower and I spend the next few days binge-watching Majestic Girls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We passionately discuss the series while waiting
eagerly for the movie to finally hit theaters.
